final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] counter);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            counter <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            counter <= {~counter[0], counter[3:1]};
        end
    end
endmodule
